WHERE [l].[Status] = N'Published' AND [t].[ClassId] = @classId
ORDER BY [l].[LessonID] DESC
OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p2 ROWS ONLY

SELECT [t2].[TeacherID], [t2].[TeacherName], [t2].[TeacherEmail], [t2].[c], [t2].[IsApproved], [s0].[ClassName], [s1].[SubjectName]
FROM (
    SELECT [t].[TeacherID], [t].[TeacherName], [t].[TeacherEmail], CASE
        WHEN [t].[TeacherPhoneNumber] IS NULL THEN ''
        ELSE COALESCE(CONVERT(varchar(11), [t].[TeacherPhoneNumber]), '')
    END AS [c], [t].[IsApproved]
    FROM [Teacher] AS [t]
    ORDER BY [t].[TeacherID] DESC
    OFFSET @p ROWS FETCH NEXT @p1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t2]
OUTER APPLY (
    SELECT DISTINCT [c].[ClassName]
    FROM [TeacherAssignment] AS [t0]
    INNER JOIN [Class] AS [c] ON [t0].[ClassId] = [c].[ClassID]
    WHERE [t0].[TeacherId] = [t2].[TeacherID]
) AS [s0]
OUTER APPLY (
    SELECT DISTINCT [s].[SubjectName]
    FROM [TeacherAssignment] AS [t1]
    INNER JOIN [Subject] AS [s] ON [t1].[SubjectId] = [s].[SubjectID]
    WHERE [t1].[TeacherId] = [t2].[TeacherID]
) AS [s1]
ORDER BY [t2].[TeacherID] DESC, [s0].[ClassName]
